regional_cost_note: Builders in Christchurch typically charge $75–$110/hr for labour. New builds range $2,800–$4,200/m² depending on specification. Post-earthquake, many local firms have extensive renovation and repair expertise. Emergency callouts add $80–$150.

businesses.name: Ahn Construction Ltd
businesses.known_for: New builds, decking and renovations; LBP licensed with 6+ years experience.

businesses.name: ACP Builders
businesses.known_for: Architectural builds and multi-unit developments; family-run by two brothers.

businesses.name: Stoic Builders Ltd
businesses.known_for: LBP licensed; 10+ years experience across architectural and residential projects.

businesses.known_for: LBP licensed with 15+ years experience; comprehensive residential builds and renovations.

businesses.name: Flippin Construction Ltd
businesses.known_for: Residential building and as-is where-is property repairs; popular with first-home buyers.

businesses.name: Jmac Contractors
businesses.known_for: Timber framing and hard landscaping; 20 years industry experience.

businesses.name: Trent Builders
businesses.known_for: Custom homes and renovations; Master Builders members with strong repeat client base.

businesses.name: Bathurst Builders Ltd

businesses.name: Mike Greer Homes Christchurch
businesses.known_for: NZ’s largest privately owned home builder; 30+ years, award-winning new builds and house-and-land packages.
